note: Historical artifact from the Phase 33-01 baseline sweep. Plans 02-04 closed the ARIA / focus / contrast categories incrementally; Plan 05 (2026-04-20) emptied DEFERRED_CATEGORIES entirely in tests/a11y/axe-baseline.spec.ts and added tabIndex=0 to the dashboard scroll wrapper — `scrollable-region-focusable` now passes. check:a11y is fully blocking: any critical/serious violation on any rule, route, or theme fails the suite.
